title: Costco Investor Relations
note: Primary source for financial disclosures, membership metrics, store count, and strategic direction.

title: Costco Annual Report / 10-K FY2024
note: Source for revenue (~$240B), net income, membership renewal rates, Kirkland Signature sales estimates, and operational metrics.

title: Costco Market Cap History
note: Historical and current market capitalization data used for marketCap and peRatio inputs.

title: National Co+op Grocers
note: Reference for cooperative grocery purchasing networks as a structural alternative to membership warehouse clubs and private-label brand models.

title: Open Food Network
note: Open-source platform for community-controlled food supply chains; reference for digital cooperative alternatives to centralized warehouse retail.

title: Thrive Market
note: Commercial online membership retailer offering wholesale natural and organic pricing; reference for online format alternatives to physical warehouse clubs.
